title: Progress schemas
description: Progress tracking and suggestion efficacy data shapes for the Dialed platform

dateTime.description: An ISO 8601 date-time string with timezone (e.g. 2026-03-18T12:00:00Z)

EfficacyStats.description: Records the measured lap time outcome for a specific AI suggestion. Written to core.efficacy_stats after the rider completes a session where they applied a suggestion. suggestion_id is a cross-schema reference — it points to ai.suggestions(id) but is stored without a foreign key constraint to avoid cross-schema coupling.

user_id.description: ID of the rider whose outcome this record captures

suggestion_id.description: Cross-schema reference to ai.suggestions(id). Stored without a database foreign key to avoid cross-schema coupling. Must be validated at the application layer.

lap_delta_ms.description: Net lap time change in milliseconds attributable to the applied suggestion. Negative values mean improvement (faster laps). Null if the outcome could not be measured.

recorded_at.description: Timestamp when this efficacy outcome was recorded
